channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: There are 2 large deep potholes and a smaller one at the speed bumps outside Coronation Flats where Charlton Court Road transitions into Oak Avenue, 6th March
item.description:
There are 2 large deep potholes and a smaller one at the speed bumps outside Coronation Flats where Charlton Court Road transitions into Oak Avenue. A child recently went into one of them on their bike, fell off due to the impact, and was bruised and battered. They are a significant hazard and need fixing urgently.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 49, Beaufort Road, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sign for Tewkesbury now pointing the wrong way., 6th March
item.description:
At the House in the Tree Pub junction the signage for Tewkesbury and the M5 has been 'rotated' around, and now points towards Sainsbury's along Hayden Road.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Old Gloucester Road, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Uncollected sign and loose tarmac in street, 6th March
item.description:
Opposite 1 Withyholt Park, GL53 9BP

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 5, Withyholt Park, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Signs & Barriers left behind by Contractor

item.title: Crater, 6th March
item.description:
Crater as you're driving up from Shell to the train station. Nearly broke my spine hitting it.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 287a, Gloucester Road, Hatherley, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A pothole in road problem, 6th March
item.description:
Customer reporting a number of potholes with one increasing rapidly in size at point of junction where road narrows.
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Loose debris on the footway, 6th March
item.description:
There is a considerable amount of loose debris and stones, some from the abysmal pot hole repair you have carried out, on the footway adjacent to the gate near Hatherley Brook.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Church Road, Warden Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Other damage to pavement i.e. cobbles, raised mound/surface

item.title: A pothole in road problem, 6th March
item.description:
large pothole causing damage to vehicles
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Loose kerb slab outside 43 Cherston Court, 6th March
item.description:
One of the kerb slabs outside 43 Cherston Court is loose and it rocks. It is therefore posing a trip hazard, or could damage a car tyre. It is at the right hand side of the drop curve as you look towards No 43 from the road.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cherston Court, Barnwood, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large potholes on Golden Vale, 6th March
item.description:
Several large potholes with lots of large gravel pieces likely to cause damage to cars or pedestrians. Been there for several weeks and getting worse every day.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Golden Vale, Churchdown, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sign warning of humps ahead is turned 90 degrees, 6th March
item.description:
Church Street, Charlton Kings, Cheltenham near the junction with New Street

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 6, Church Street, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Sign plate is misaligned (Non illuminating sign)

item.title: Sign plate for two way traffic ahead misaligned, 6th March
item.description:
Copt Elm Road, Cheltenham at the junction of Horsefair Street

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 77, Copt Elm Road, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Sign plate is misaligned (Non illuminating sign)

item.title: Sign plate missligned, 6th March
item.description:
Horsefair Street at the junction with Court Elm Road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 5, Horsefair Street, Cheltenham

item.category: Sign plate is misaligned (Non illuminating sign)

item.title: Lamps on sign giving direction are out, 6th March
item.description:
Attached to a street light on the east side of the A46 Bath Road, Cheltenham
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bath Road, Montpellier, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Not only a pothole, 6th March
item.description:
Potholes and road actually disintegrating across the two lanes just by the area which has recently had the slowig up narrowing of the road feature. Not far from Asda. This section of the road is appalling and needs urgent attention to avoid an accident happening.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hatherley Lane, Hatherley, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Many items fly tipped along the service road at the back of Albert Street and Hungerford Street, 5th March
item.description:
Bad fly tipping all along this road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 10, Albert Street, Marle Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Drainage gully still blocked in lane "maintained at public expense, Gloucestershire" as shown in land registry searches, 5th March
item.description:
Service road at back of Albert Street and Hungerford street, Cheltenham. This is an unowned road but is shown as Gloucestershire's responsibility on land registry.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 12, Hungerford Street, Marle Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Entire road surface cracked and full of pot holes, 5th March
item.description:
Albermarle road, churchdown
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 58, Albemarle Road, Churchdown, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: There is a pothole on the road right in front of 19 Tennyson Road, 5th March
item.description:
There is a large and deep pothole on the road directly outside 19 Tennyson Road GL517BX. It is a hazard to vehicles and has already burst a car tyre. This needs urgent attention to prevent further damage or accidents.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 23, Brooklyn Road, St Mark's, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large series of potholes along path running from parton road to parton manor school entrance making it dangerous for padestrians, 5th March
item.description:
Parton road by library running to school entrance.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 58, Parton Road, Churchdown, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Many if the kerb stones are damaged or loose and the road surface itself all onlong orchard way, holtham avenue and meadow way are cracked, damaged and uneven., 5th March
item.description:
All along meadow way, orchard way and Holtham avenue.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Churchdown, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet
